form.selectActivityDesc: Choose the environmental activity you performed
form.dataInputDesc: Enter the amount or duration of your activity
form.submitDesc: Review and submit your activity for approval

form.clickOrDrag: Click or drag to upload images
form.imageRequired: Please upload at least one image as proof
form.previewPlaceholder: Fill in the value to view real-time calculation
form.submitHint: Your activity will be reviewed before points are awarded
form.submitSuccessDesc: Your activity has been submitted and is pending review
form.reviewNotice: Activities are typically reviewed within 24 hours

form.previewAutoUpdate: Updates in real time as you edit.

uploadErrors.proofImageRequiredDetail: Upload at least one proof image before submitting.
uploadErrors.expiredSessionSummary: Your login has expired. Please sign in again before uploading.
uploadErrors.unsupportedFormatSummary: This image format is not supported.
uploadErrors.fileTooLargeSummary: The image is too large to upload.
uploadErrors.storageDelaySummary: The image reached storage, but the server could not confirm it yet.
uploadErrors.storageDelayDetail: This is usually a temporary storage delay. Please wait a moment and try again.
uploadErrors.ownershipConflictSummary: The server rejected this file because its ownership record conflicts with another upload.
uploadErrors.ownershipConflictDetail: Please rename the file or choose another image and try again.
uploadErrors.invalidConfigDetail: Please contact an administrator if this keeps happening.
uploadErrors.networkDetail: Please check your connection and try again.
uploadErrors.timeoutDetail: Please try again in a moment.
uploadErrors.putSummary: The image could not be sent to storage.
uploadErrors.putDetail: Please try again. If it still fails, the storage service may be temporarily unavailable.
uploadErrors.presignSummary: The server could not prepare this upload.
uploadErrors.confirmSummary: The image uploaded, but the server failed to finish confirmation.
